market_overview.headline: Broad market weakness with SPY breaking down and BTC in full bear structure while only 28% of stocks remain in full bull trends.
market_overview.detail: SPY shows 'Bull Breakdown' with price below all EMAs, QQQ is bearish unstacked, and BTC sits 47% below fair value in full bear mode. Only 85 of 300 stocks maintain full bull structure while 63 are in full bear.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates with Bullish Cross Potential

items.name: Intercontinental Exchange Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.01%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.25%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Strong buy rated financial exchange showing early reversal signs with price rallying above 13W EMA.

items.name: NVIDIA Corporation
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.25%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.88%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Mega-cap AI leader showing potential 8W/13W bullish cross despite bearish structure.

items.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.51%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.83%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Social media giant in full bear but showing dual bullish cross potential across all timeframes.

items.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
items.note: E-commerce leader showing 13W/21W bullish cross setup despite being in full bear structure.

items.name: JP Morgan Chase & Co.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.77%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.20%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Banking giant showing potential 8W/13W bullish cross with strong buy rating.

pullback_setups.headline: Quality Pullback Entries in Established Uptrends

items.name: Western Digital Corporation
items.note: Memory storage leader pulling back to 13W support with strong 18% cushion above 21W EMA.

items.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
items.note: Memory giant showing classic pullback setup with strong analyst support and 16% uptrend buffer.

items.name: Applied Materials, Inc.
items.note: Semiconductor equipment leader in healthy pullback with 11% cushion above key 21W support.

items.name: Newmont Corporation
items.note: Gold mining leader showing textbook pullback entry with 10% uptrend margin intact.

momentum_themes.headline: Commodities and Industrial Momentum Leaders
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals and non-energy minerals sectors dominating with 100% bullish participation. Electronic technology showing mixed signals but GLW and VRT leading momentum acceleration.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodities Strong, Tech Services Weak

strongest.note: Perfect bullish setup with all 10 stocks in uptrends averaging 15% above 21W.
Mining and metals showing unanimous strength with 7 pullback entries available.
All 3 names in full bull mode with strong momentum characteristics.

weakest.note: Tech services decimated with 20 of 22 stocks in bearish structure.
All 3 commercial service names in full bearish breakdown.
Banking sector under pressure with 47 of 101 stocks in bearish trends.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into value commodities and industrials. Energy and materials showing exceptional strength while tech services face broad-based selling pressure.

items.text: SPY breaking down below all EMAs with 8W/13W bearish cross risk imminent
BTC showing severe weakness 47% below fair value, could drag risk assets lower
Technology services sector in wholesale liquidation with 91% bearish participation
Only 28% of stocks in full bull structure suggests broad market weakness ahead
